prompt: what's the difference between --compare-strategy checksum and --compare-strategy row_hash? when should I use each?

assertions.text: Explained that checksum only covers numeric and boolean columns
Explained that row_hash covers all column types via xxhash64
Gave guidance on when to use each (e.g. checksum for numeric aggregations, row_hash for full coverage)
Mentioned that both strategies avoid collecting rows to the driver
